title: orchis punctulata subsp. stevenii
intro: Orchis punctulata subsp. stevenii, also known as the Steven's orchid, is a type of plant species in the Orchidaceae family, specifically a subspecies of the Orchis punctulata. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Orchis punctulata subsp. stevenii include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and ease breathing, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and soothe irritated tissues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
